features.name: Register account
definition_of_done: Visitor can submit email and password from Android app
Successful registration shows confirmation and next-step navigation
Request/response mapping is covered by tests

implementation.summary: Created Android Gradle scaffold, app module, core/domain/data/feature modules, and implemented registration flow through RegisterScreen, RegisterViewModel, RegisterUserUseCase, AuthRepository, Retrofit AuthApi, DTO mapping, and Hilt wiring.
notes: Registration posts email and password to POST /api/auth/users/register and maps userId/email response.
Successful registration shows confirmation and navigates to the sign-in route placeholder; full sign-in implementation remains ST-03.
Duplicate email UX is completed by ST-02.

features.name: Prevent duplicate account registration
definition_of_done: Duplicate email response is detected correctly
User sees a readable error and remains on registration screen
Field values are preserved for retry

implementation.summary: Handled duplicate-email registration failures by mapping registration 409 Conflict responses to duplicate-email feedback, preserving entered form values, and rendering the message under the email field. Also mapped backend 400 validation errors for Email and Password to field-level registration errors.
notes: Repository tests cover 409 conflict mapping and 400 validation payload parsing.
RegisterViewModel tests cover duplicate-email feedback, preserved form values, and field-level backend validation feedback.
Manual backend/emulator smoke testing was not run; automated repository and ViewModel coverage was used for this pass.

features.name: Sign in
definition_of_done: Registered user can sign in successfully
JWT session is stored securely on device
Authenticated app flow becomes available after login

features.name: Show sign-in failure clearly
definition_of_done: Invalid credentials show clear error
Inactive account shows clear error
Error mapping is covered by unit or integration tests

features.name: View current profile
definition_of_done: Signed-in user can open profile screen
Profile shows user id and email
Invalid session redirects user safely to sign-in

features.name: Browse product catalog
definition_of_done: Visitor can open catalog without authentication
Catalog list renders backend items correctly
Empty state is shown when no products exist

features.name: Search products
definition_of_done: User can submit a search term from catalog screen
Results update to matching SKU or product name entries
Search state is preserved across recomposition or rotation

features.name: Filter products by active status
definition_of_done: User can switch between all, active, and inactive filters
Selected filter updates catalog results correctly
Selected filter remains visible in UI state

features.name: Load additional catalog pages
definition_of_done: User can load next page from catalog screen
New items are appended without losing current context
Pagination behavior is covered by integration or UI tests

features.name: View product details
definition_of_done: User can open product detail from catalog list
Product detail shows sku, name, description, active status, created and updated dates when available
Not-found or load failures show a readable error state

features.name: Create a product
definition_of_done: Authenticated user can submit SKU, name, and optional description
Successful create shows confirmation and navigates to refreshed list or detail screen
Request includes bearer authentication

features.name: Validate product creation input
definition_of_done: Missing or invalid SKU and name show field-level or form-level errors
No product is created until errors are fixed
Validation behavior is covered by unit tests

features.name: Prevent duplicate SKU creation
definition_of_done: Conflict response for existing SKU is handled correctly
User sees readable duplicate-SKU message
User can edit SKU and retry without losing other inputs

features.name: Update product details
definition_of_done: Authenticated user can edit product name and description
SKU remains read-only and unchanged
Successful update refreshes detail state correctly

features.name: Deactivate a product
definition_of_done: Authenticated user must confirm before deactivation
Successful deactivation updates UI to inactive state
Product disappears from active-only filtered list

features.name: Block protected actions for visitors
definition_of_done: Unsigned user cannot enter protected product-management flows
Protected action redirects or prompts for sign-in
After successful sign-in, user can continue intended action where practical
